ogTitle: Scott River vs Scott River East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Scott River and Scott River East.
heading: Scott River vs Scott River East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Scott River, Western Australia and Scott River East, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Scott River has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Scott River East (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Scott River or Scott River East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Scott River has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Scott River East scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Scott River scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Scott River East scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Scott River or Scott River East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Scott River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
